scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @mensa/api && npm run build --workspace @mensa/web && npm run build --workspace @mensa/alexa
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @mensa/api && npm run test --workspace @mensa/web && npm run test --workspace @mensa/alexa
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @mensa/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @mensa/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @mensa/alexa && tsc --noEmit -p netlify/functions/tsconfig.json
